value.description: Controlled selected color. When provided, the parent owns the state.

defaultValue.description: Initial selected color for uncontrolled use. Ignored when `value` is set.

shape.description: Visual shape of each swatch. Default `'circle'`.

layout.description:
Layout direction. Default `'grid'`.

Note: grid layout uses one-dimensional DOM-order navigation for both
ArrowLeft/Right and ArrowUp/Down. True column-aware navigation is not
implemented in v1 — see a11y memo.

disabled.description: Disables the entire listbox. Keyboard activation and clicks are ignored.

label.description:
Accessible name for the listbox. Required — `role="listbox"` needs a label
so screen readers can announce the control's purpose.

class.description: Additional classes merged into the listbox `<ul>`.

unsupportedProps.name: indicator
unsupportedProps.description:
Snippet that replaces the default check-icon indicator on the selected swatch.
Receives the active swatch and the computed contrast color for the icon.

unsupportedProps.name: onchange
unsupportedProps.description: Fired when the selected swatch changes.
